overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit urban street, ascending stairs to an elevated terrace, and entering an upscale modern bar with futuristic interior design, ambient neon lighting in teal and magenta, and scattered patrons.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rain-slicked cyberpunk street at night, wet asphalt reflecting vibrant neon signs from surrounding buildings. A futuristic sedan passes by as the camera walks forward toward a building entrance marked by a security kiosk.

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase with glass railings, transitioning from the street level to an elevated terrace. The neon building facade remains visible to the left as the stairs lead upward.

segments.scene_description: Walking across the elevated terrace with tiled flooring, the camera passes pedestrians standing near glass railings. A large digital advertisement screen glows above the bar entrance ahead as the scene transitions from outdoor to indoor space.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale cyberpunk bar with neon ambient lighting

metal elevator doors at the far end of the lounge area

segments.scene_description: Inside the upscale bar, neon ceiling strips shift colors between cyan and magenta, illuminating the polished marble floor. The camera explores past the bar counter with glowing stools, lounge seating with patrons, and a large glass terrarium filled with tropical plants, ending near elevator doors at the far end of the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked cyberpunk street into the polished interior of an upscale futuristic bar. It begins on wet asphalt reflecting vibrant neon signs as a futuristic sedan passes by, moving forward toward a security kiosk at a building entrance. The camera then ascends a wide concrete staircase with glass railings, transitioning from the street level to an elevated terrace while the neon facade remains visible to the left. As the camera crosses the tiled terrace past pedestrians and under a glowing digital advertisement, the scene shifts from the outdoor night air into a modern indoor space. Finally, the view glides across polished marble floors illuminated by cyan and magenta ceiling strips, passing glowing bar stools and a tropical glass terrarium before coming to a stop near distant elevator doors.
